description: Style NoteMinimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ!Product DetailsCase style:  Stainless steel round case Dial style: Black dial with green hands and branding displayed on the dialStrap style: Black plastic strap with a tang claspFeatures: Screw to reset time  Waterproof to 5 BAR, allowing you to use it even when showeringWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 6 mm
